title: Roadmap to formulate a Multicriteria Decision Analysis (MCDA)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8helo","text":"Multicriteria desicion analysis (MCDA) is a tool used to perform quantitative benefit-risks assessment (BRA) anlysis in drugs, procedures and devices in health. It allows comparisons in the same indication, that allows quantitative BRA balances, is useful to shows results in a transparency and consistency manner and also to communicate easily to the stakeholders.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"essu4","text":" ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"97l2u","text":"MCDA has emerged as a promising tool in the decision context for drugs, although its use has been relegated to assess drugs in the context of medicine reimbursment and a few for benefits, risks and others assessments in medicines for a particular indication. One of the major advantages of MCDA is the inclusion of criterian weights that is \"preferences\". this roadmap to formulate a MCDA compile the recomendations of IMI-PROTECT and ISPOR task force to easy, explicit and transparent election of criteria included in a MCDA.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"c0b8r","text":"IMI-PROTECT Benefit-Risk Group RECOMMENDATIONS REPORT; Recommendations for the methodology and visualisation techniques to be used in the assessment of benefit and risk of medicines","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fplpr","text":"Multiple Criteria Decision Analysis for Health Care Decision Making—An Introduction: Report 1 of the ISPOR MCDA Emerging Good Practices Task Force","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"fcad8","text":"Multiple Criteria Decision Analysis for Health Care Decision Making—Emerging Good Practices: Report 2 of the ISPORMCDA Emerging Good Practices Task Force","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
creator: Jose Mendoza-Sanchez
